title.en: This treasure is the true liquid of nothingness.

content.en:
Ye Tian had also received a list of treasures handed down from the Twelve Ancestors, many of which he had never heard of, and there was even one treasure that could forcibly raise the Ninefold Supreme to the Half-Step Eternal Realm.

This treasure is the true liquid of nothingness.

But Ye Tian knew very well that such a treasure must be extremely rare, even in the primordial sea, it may not be available, but there is an extremely low probability.

Moreover, once it is really born, I am afraid that a group of top half-step Eternal Realms will snatch it, and it will not be the turn of the Nine Tier Supreme to snatch it at all.

If the Ninefold Supreme could be easily obtained, the original Star Ancestor would not have been trapped in the Ninefold Supreme Realm for an infinite number of years, and was finally suppressed.

Soon after.

The Twelve Ancestors took many members of the Inner Circle of the Source God Pavilion to the Primordial Sea, and everyone kept shuttling, and finally came to a Source Sea area.

There seems to be nothing here, as if unlike anywhere else, nothing special.

But soon, there was a Supreme Being, and the lowest cultivation level was basically a Sevenfold Supreme Being, and most of them were Ninefold Supreme and a half-step Eternal Realm.

Ye Tian is very inconspicuous here, but his strength is definitely not weak, and he is at the middle level.

Time passed slowly, and many Supreme Beings and Half-Step Eternal Realms were waiting here slowly, without the slightest impatience.

Abrupt.

The area began to ripple.

Ye Tian had a deep understanding of the rules of eternity, so he sensed the ups and downs of time and space here, as if there was a special origin transmitted from the unknown depths of time and space to the source sea.

However, he could not reach that particular plane, and there was no trace of him.

"Sure enough, there is no special method, I can't find the original sea at all, and even if I come here, I don't have a way to get in. Ye Tian muttered.

"The Origin Tide has begun!"

A half-step Eternal Realm spoke.

On the side of the Source God Pavilion, the Twelve Ancestors made a move.

I saw that the Twelve Ancestors took out one leaf after another, and each leaf was filled with special power.

"Come up!"

The Twelve Ancestors reminded.

Whoa!!!

A Supreme One came to the leaf, and Ye Tian also stood on the leaf at the feet of the Wind Ancient Origin Ancestor.

Then, these leaves ignored the Source Sea Void and followed the origin tide into this special space-time.

I saw that the surrounding time and space were constantly distorted, and the leaves carried Ye Tian to move forward.

At this time, the Wind Ancient Origin Ancestor introduced: "This leaf is not an ordinary leaf, but the Origin Sea Strange Origin Leaf, it has no other role, the only use is that it can carry the Supreme One into the Primordial Sea, the number is very limited, it is only in the hands of a few top powers, without the Primordial Leaf, even the top half-step Eternal Realm, there is no way to enter the Primordial Sea." "

"Primordial leaves!"

Ye Tian understood what was going on.

Soon, they arrived at the original sea.

The position of each primordial leaf entering the primordial sea is different, after all, the Wind Ancient Origin Ancestor has no way to control the direction, and it is good to be able to enter the primordial sea.

Primordial Sea.

Feng Gu Yuan Ancestor and Ye Tian and the others came here, on top of a small island, surrounded by a golden ocean, all of which were condensed to the extreme of the origin.

Moreover, the suppression here is very strong, and ordinary supreme beings simply cannot withstand the suppressive force here.

"Let's separate, you need primordial leaves to enter the primordial sea, but you don't need to go out, you can fly out by following the origin tide. "

Feng Gu Yuan Ancestor reminded.

Ye Tian said that he understood that the sky above was the origin tide, and it was constantly flowing towards the origin outside of time and space, and it could be out by flying out along there.

Those who enter the supreme or half-step eternal realm here need to pay attention to the dynamics of the origin tide at all times, once the origin tide has traces of dissipation, they must rush out as soon as possible, otherwise it will be easy to be trapped.

Whoa!!!

A Supreme One dispersed and shuttled into the distance, and the Wind Ancient Origin Ancestor also left, not taking any Supreme One with him.

He brought Ye Tian and them into the Primordial Sea, which was already very good, so naturally he would not continue to care about them.

Ye Tian casually chose a direction and began to slowly look for resources.

There are no creatures in the primordial sea, but it doesn't mean that there is no danger, but it is very dangerous, and if the strength is not good, it is easy to fall.

One danger is from other Supreme Beings or even Half-Step Eternal Realm, if an Eightfold Supreme finds a lot of treasures, and a Half-Step Eternal Realm sees it, maybe he will kill the Eightfold Supreme with his hand, so that he can obtain a lot of resources without looking for them.

How nice is that!

There is also a danger that there will be black fog in some places in the primordial sea, and once it touches those places, it will cause black fog erosion.

These black mist will not spread during the origin tide, but once they are actively touched, even a half-step Eternal Realm will be seriously injured, and it will be almost impossible for the Eightfold Supreme to save their lives.

It was precisely because of this that the danger of the primordial sea was so terrifying that many supreme beings did not dare to enter at all.

I have to say that there are too many resources in the original sea.

Soon, Ye Tian found a lot of good things.

"An Eternal Origin!"

Ye Tian saw that a stone was placed on the mountain of an island, and the aura emitted by this stone was the eternal source.

It was like an ordinary stone, if it weren't for the fact that its aura was too obvious, Ye Tian wouldn't have believed it.

Wow!

Ye Tian put the stone away, and he was in a very good mood.

After all, you can pick up an eternal source object at your fingertips, and you are really lucky.

However, next, Ye Tian did not find the second Eternal Source Item, but he found a lot of Eternal Resources and resources that could improve the cultivation of the Supreme One.

According to this harvest, even if Ye Tian did not find any amazing treasures, he would not come in vain.

"No wonder everyone wants to become a member of the inner circle of the Source God Pavilion, this chance alone is enough to make some bold supreme go crazy!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian gained more and more.

And on this day, he finally encountered another supreme being, not the supreme of the Source God Pavilion, but from other forces.

This supreme cultivator was the Eighth Heaven, and after seeing Ye Tian, his eyes showed a light of excitement.

He shot directly at Ye Tian, obviously wanting to kill Ye Tian and seize the treasure on Ye Tian's body.

For such a supreme person, Ye Tian is not polite.

"Finger of Destruction!"

Ye Tian used this Eternal Technique, directly mobilizing that Eternal Realm powerful finger, although he did not burst out with the strongest blow with all his strength, he also played an attack power comparable to that of the top Nine Heavens Supreme.

Bang!!!!

A finger that was enough to annihilate everything directly shattered the opponent's defenses, pressed on the opponent's body, and directly crushed the opponent's body.
